summary: Verified iPhone Safari date/time input overflow fix on mobile viewport 390x844 (Chromium+webkit UA). Both empty and filled states verified. Desktop regression also verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iPhone date/time overflow fix verified. Note: emulation is Chromium+iPhone UA (real webkit engine unavailable); however CSS rules (-webkit-appearance:none, width:100%, min-width:0, box-sizing:border-box, ::-webkit-date-and-time-value min-width:0) are the correct standard fix documented for iOS Safari intrinsic-width behavior. Recommend final verification on a real iPhone if possible.
